title: hypericum erectum var. parviflorum
intro: Hypericum erectum var. parviflorum, also known as Dwarf St. John's Wort, is a low-growing, woody shrub that belongs to the St. John's Wort family (Hypericaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The health benefits associated with Dwarf St. John's Wort include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, alleviate mild depression, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, with the flowers and leaves being the most commonly used parts for medicinal purposes.
